text: Speak in an accent for your entire turn
You must whisper when giving clues
No hands allowed — keep them behind your back
You must stand up for your entire turn
Describe every word using only questions
You must close your eyes while describing
Describe without using the word 'the' or 'a'
You must rhyme every clue you give
Speak in slow motion for your entire turn
You must point at something in the room for every clue
You must use a funny voice for your entire turn
You cannot use your hands to gesture at all
Describe everything as if explaining to a 5-year-old
